# publish

Sidebar entry and filterable tree pane for pre-publish plugin review. Shows
the full plugin tree with stats; selecting a plugin opens the plugin-view
detail pane as the adjacent Miller column. No server component — data is
served by the plugin-meta/plugin-view plugin.

## Plugin reference

- Description: Sidebar entry and filterable tree pane for pre-publish plugin review.
- Contributes:
  - `Pane.Register` "publish"
  - `Forge.Sidebar` "Publish"

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Sidebar entry and filterable tree pane for pre-publish plugin review.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Pane.Register` "publish", `Forge.Sidebar` "Publish" → `component`
  - Exports: Types: `TreeRowBadgeContribution`; Values: `Publish`, `usePluginTree`
- Sub-plugins:
  - **`child-count`** — Recursive child count badge in the publish plugin tree row.
  - **`collapsed`** — Collapsed badge in the publish plugin tree row.
  - **`expand-collapse`** — Expand/collapse all descendants button in the publish plugin tree row.
  - **`load-bearing`** — Load-bearing badge in the publish plugin tree row.

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
